headline: Trump's Gaza committee remains an empty shell paralyzed by Israel
description: Created four months ago as part of Donald Trump's peace plan, the entity is supposed to manage the coastal territory in place of Hamas. But Israel is preventing its members from entering, leaving them stranded in their offices in Cairo.

headline: French Open heat is 'insane,' Czech player says after collapsing on court
How France's early heatwave is affecting plants and wildlife
'This case began with lies; it must end with the truth': Sarkozy's closing remarks at appeal trial
description: The former French president's lawyers attempted to dismantle the accusations of corruption, criminal conspiracy and illegal campaign funding. The court's decision will be delivered on November 30.

headline: In Brittany, luxury tourism is taking over the coastline
description: In Saint-Malo, a court granted approval at the end of March for the construction of a 4- and 5-star hotel complex and a thalassotherapy center on the site of a former municipal campground. This luxury project is one of many springing up across the region.

headline: What animal is behind the Ebola epidemic? The answer isn't straightforward
description: The search for the source of hemorrhagic fever outbreaks has yet to reveal a definitive culprit. In the absence of conclusive evidence, fruit bats have emerged as the main suspects.

headline: By backtracking on environmental progress, Macron is 'betraying' the French, former members of the Climate Convention write
description: The signatories of this open letter warn about the government's dismantling of the Climate and Resilience law and call on citizens to defend 'their' law.

'Do you realize that your statements are completely absurd?': Inside the arrest of the Louvre burglars
description: In their new book, journalists Jean-Michel Décugis, Nicolas-Charles Torrent and Le Monde's Jérémie Pham-Lê recount the events of the burglary at the Paris museum on October 19, 2025, and the arrest of the suspects. Here are excerpts from the book.
byline: Jean-Michel Décugis,  Jérémie Pham-Lê and  Nicolas-Charles Torrent

headline: Kyiv attacks: The complex logistics network behind Russia's war machine
description: The Ukrainian capital endured a barrage of strikes over the weekend, including ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and long-range drones. These increasingly frequent hybrid operations reveal the intensification of Russian drone and missile production.

headline: French banker lands exceptional and controversial contract to restructure Venezuelan debt
description: Matthieu Pigasse was tapped by Caracas to negotiate the restructuring of Venezuela's massive debt. His competitors suspect Washington played a role.

headline: French presidential election: Strategic voting risks stripping the campaign of debate
